name: Shaman

abilities.name: Lightning Bolt
abilities.desc: Hurls a bolt of lightning for $d Nature damage.

abilities.name: Rockbiter Weapon
abilities.desc: Imbues your weapon with the fury of stone: each swing deals 5 additional damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Earth Shock
abilities.desc: Instantly shocks the target with concussive force for $d Nature damage.

abilities.name: Lightning Shield
abilities.desc: Surrounds you with crackling lightning: melee attackers take 13 Nature damage, up to 3 charges and at most once every 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Flame Shock
abilities.desc: Sears the target with fire for 25 damage plus $d over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Flametongue Weapon
abilities.desc: Imbues your weapon with elemental fire: each swing deals 8 additional Fire damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Frost Shock
abilities.desc: Instantly shocks the target with frost for $d Frost damage and slows its movement by 50% for 8 sec.

abilities.name: Frostbrand Weapon
abilities.desc: Imbues your weapon with biting frost: each swing deals 8 additional damage for 5 min.

abilities.name: Ghost Wolf
abilities.desc: Turns you into a Ghost Wolf, increasing movement speed by 40%. Cast again to return to normal form.

abilities.name: Stormstrike
abilities.desc: Channels the storm through your weapon, instantly striking for weapon damage plus $d.

abilities.name: Earthquake
abilities.desc: Shakes the target area, battering enemies for $d Nature damage.

playbook: You are playing a Shaman (mana-based, melee).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to 5 yards (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
